{{Quote|Troubled is the planet Mon Calamari. Its races have divided. The droid army of the Quarren Isolation League moves against the Calamari Council. Alone, the Calamari are no match. Intervene we must!|Yoda|<ref name="CW" />}}
The '''Mon Calamari Council''', sometimes known as '''Dac Council''' or '''Calamarian Council''', was the governing body on the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], made up of both [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] which represented their respective cities. An example was [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], the representative from [[Coral City/Legends|Coral City]].

==History==
After the rise of the Separatist Movement, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] visited Mon Calamari. Judging them to be advanced, Dooku offered the world membership in the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], but the Council rejected his offer.<ref name="Geonosis">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Council was briefly overturned by the [[Quarren Isolation League/Legends|Quarren Isolation League]]. However, the [[Mon Calamari Knights/Legends|Mon Calamari Knights]], with a little help from the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]], allowed the Calamarian Council to [[Battle of Mon Calamari (Clone Wars)/Legends|retain their power]].<ref name="CW" />

They could not, however, defeat the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], and became part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] soon after that.<ref name="Geonosis" />

Mon Calamari was [[Calamarian Revolt|liberated]] early during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. However, the Mon Calamari Council did not vote to fully join the Alliance to Restore the Republic, in part due to Quarren fears of an alliance with another Human dominated group. They were also fearing Imperial retribution, especially when Administrator [[Seegree]] disappeared. The Council feared that she had been kidnapped by Imperial forces, but joined a task force to locate her.<ref name="Geonosis" />

Imperial infiltrators were [[Calamari Project|dispatched]] to disrupt the planet's supplying the Rebel Alliance with [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. The team successfully caused a series of suspicious accidents in the [[Farium/Legends|farium]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Morjanssik Mine|operation]] in [[Morjanssik]] on Mon Calamari. The Mon Calamari Council divided along species lines over the cause of the accidents and became politically paralyzed. The Council's Mon Calamari members suspected Imperial involvement, while the Council's [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] members refuted the allegations, which they believed called into question the competence of the Quarren miners that operated the mine.<ref name="DITU">''[[Death in the Undercity]]''</ref>

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] and several members of the Mon Calamari Council were [[Battle of Daluuj|rescued]] on [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]]<ref name="TNEGtC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> by the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]].<ref name="It's a Trap">"[[It's a Trap]]"</ref> Thus, in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the Mon Calamari Council finally decided to make the planet become a full member of the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]]'s [[Battle of Calamari|attacks]] on their planet, one of the [[World Devastator]]s, the ''[[Nullifier-5]]'', sunk on the [[Algae Sward]]. The Council decided that salvaging it was too expensive, so it was only deactivated. However, a time after that, the ''Nullifier-5'' began to suffer leaks and threatened to poison the Algae Sward, so the Council asked an independent team to solve this problem.<ref name="Geonosis" />

In [[137 ABY]], [[Darth Krayt]], alongside [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] executed the entire Council, including [[Gial Gahan]], for being allies with [[Gar Stazi]].<ref name="Legacy" />

==Behind the scenes==
In "[[It's a Trap]]", the Heroes of Yavin rescue a group of Mon Calamari on Daluuj.<ref name="It's a Trap" /> Ackbar's entry in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' revealed the Mon Calamari in "Revenge of the Jedi" to be members of the Mon Calamari Council.<ref name="TNEGtC" />
